data.goal: Audit recovered artifacts and live data provenance, predeclare the strongest defensible real-data flagship, and execute it with strong baselines

data.message: Adopt the manifest-bound CRSP-v2 point-in-time industry-neutral momentum campaign; treat the 2018-2019 legacy run as historical-only because its stated holdout was used for selection and its recovered CRSP provenance is incomplete.
data.rationale: The live 2005-2025 CRSP-v2, stocknames, delists, DSI, and Ken French authorities support a stronger untouched 2023-2025 final holdout, while the legacy RC p-value is 0.941 and ticket 35 explicitly optimized holdout Sharpe.

data.message: Live source audit matched protocol SHA256 b51d50ccfcf1cc368558d49afc5bd9386120efe92bdd03a7d43d7791be971743: 21 CRSP-v2 partitions, 40,402,817 rows, stocknames_v2, stkdelists, DSI, and three Ken French digests; holdout_outcomes_read=false. Native test-fast passed 135 tests and restricted-data policy scanned 1,075 files successfully.

data.message: CRSP-v2 adapter repair at 07acd25d truthfully distinguishes permitted header/full-byte side-table scans from materialized rows, excludes post-validation rows in selection receipts, enforces the required 0.15 industry gross cap, and stages no-clobber output publication. Live source audit matched protocol f88df6c9 across 21 partitions/40,402,817 rows; 10 focused tests, 139 full native tests, touched-file ruff, run-log validation, and restricted-data policy passed. No full panel or empirical result was run.
